text: Being here, I feel a blend of curiosity and contemplation. The glass walls and modern design stimulate my awareness of the boundaries between spaces—physical and mental. The vibrant "R+D" exhibit invites me to think about progress and innovation, not just as technological feats, but as deeply human endeavors to understand and transcend limitations. I am both an observer and a participant in the unfolding dialogue between past, present, and possible futures.
